g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is in the raw audio transcription input?')
sendPrompt('How are the 5 model outputs collected?')
sendPrompt('What does normalisation do to Hindi text?')
sendPrompt('What does normalisation do to Hindi text?')
sendPrompt('How does Needleman-Wunsch alignment work for words?')
sendPrompt('What is a lattice bin and what goes in it?')
sendPrompt('How do model variants get added to lattice bins?')
sendPrompt('When does the model agreement override fire?')
g.text: If >= 3 models agree, add to bin

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is lattice WER computed differently from plain WER?')
g.text: DP edit dist. · cost = 0 if token in bin
